editorial_accuracy.notes: 133 evidence blocks, zero inline markers. 47 malformed sources fixed. All dropcaps clean. No content regressions.

information_design.notes: Clean content hierarchy across all 31 chapters. Proper dropcaps, no duplicate title blocks.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Dropcaps render correctly. Evidence blocks consistent. No typography regressions.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Clean build. GA4 integration follows best practices with async loading.

accessibility.notes: No regression. Semantic HTML maintained. GA4 script is non-blocking.

security.notes: CSP updated to allow GA4 domains (googletagmanager.com, google-analytics.com, analytics.google.com). Minimal attack surface expansion — trusted Google domains only.
